flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concordia University-Nebraska rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.3k → $40.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Concordia University-Nebraska rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.3k → $40.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concordia University-Nebraska fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concordia University-Nebraska rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (58.2% → 64.9%).
